languages.text: "Уйти... но Номос не хотят. Номос хотят остаться с тобо..."

traits.locale_text: "Уйти... но Номос не хотят. Номос хотят остаться с тобо..."

languages.text: "Leave... But Nomos do not want to. Nomos want to stay with you—"
languages.original_text: "Уйти... но Номос не хотят. Номос хотят остаться с тобо..."

traits.locale_text: "Go away... but Nomos not want. Nomos want stay with yo..."
"Go away... but Nomos not want. Nomos want stay with yo..."
"Leave... But Nomos does not want to. Nomos wants to stay with you..."
"Leave... But Nomos does not want to. Nomos wants to stay with you..."
"Leave... But Nomos do not want to. Nomos want to stay with you—"

languages.text: "Gehen ... Aber Nomos nicht wollen. Nomos wollen bei Euch bleiben ..."
languages.original_text: "Leave... But Nomos do not want to. Nomos want to stay with you—"

traits.locale_text: "Gehen ... Aber Nomos nicht wollen. Nomos wollen bei Euch bleiben ..."

languages.text: “离开……但诺莫斯不想。诺莫斯想留在你身边——”
languages.original_text: "Leave... But Nomos do not want to. Nomos want to stay with you—"

traits.locale_text: “离开……但诺莫斯不想。诺莫斯想留在你身边——”

languages.text: « Vous quitter... Mais nous n'en avons pas envie. Nous voulons rester avec vous... »
languages.original_text: "Leave... But Nomos do not want to. Nomos want to stay with you—"

traits.locale_text: « Vous quitter... Mais nous n'en avons pas envie. Nous voulons rester avec vous... »

languages.text: «Dejarle... pero Nomos no queremos. Nomos queremos quedarnos con usted...».
languages.original_text: "Leave... But Nomos do not want to. Nomos want to stay with you—"

traits.locale_text: «Dejarle... pero Nomos no queremos. Nomos queremos quedarnos con usted...».

languages.text: "Ayrılmak... Ama Nomos istemiyor. Nomos kalmak istiyor..."
languages.original_text: "Leave... But Nomos do not want to. Nomos want to stay with you—"

traits.locale_text: "Ayrılmak... Ama Nomos istemiyor. Nomos kalmak istiyor..."

languages.text: 「去る...だがノモスは望まない。ノモスは君と残りたい」
languages.original_text: "Leave... But Nomos do not want to. Nomos want to stay with you—"

traits.locale_text: 「去る...だがノモスは望まない。ノモスは君と残りたい」
